name: Bhatt Lab
raw_description: The Bhatt Lab studies the human microbiome using metagenomic sequencing and computational tools to understand how microbial communities influence human health and disease, including cancer and immune disorders.

name: Bhattacharya Lab (Immunobiology)
raw_description: Studies B cell development and the mechanisms by which B cells recognize antigen and generate antibody diversity, with implications for autoimmunity and vaccine design.

name: Bhattacharya Lab (Surgery)
raw_description: Translational surgical oncology research focusing on tumor microenvironment, immune evasion, and novel therapeutic approaches for gastrointestinal cancers.

name: Krishnaswamy Lab
raw_description: Develops geometric deep learning and manifold learning methods for single-cell genomics, enabling analysis of high-dimensional biological data to understand cellular differentiation and disease.

name: Bhattacharya Lab (MB&B)
raw_description: Structural and biochemical studies of RNA-protein complexes, focusing on how non-coding RNAs regulate gene expression using cryo-EM and X-ray crystallography.

name: Bhattacharya Lab (Psychiatry)
raw_description: Uses computational genomics and transcriptomics to identify genetic and molecular mechanisms underlying psychiatric disorders including schizophrenia, bipolar disorder, and depression.

name: Bhattacharya Lab (Pediatrics)
raw_description: Investigates the immunological basis of pediatric inflammatory diseases and allergy, with a focus on innate immune sensing and type 2 inflammatory pathways in children.

name: Bhattacharya Lab (Epidemiology)
raw_description: Population-based studies of infectious disease epidemiology, with emphasis on emerging pathogens, antimicrobial resistance, and global health interventions in low-resource settings.

name: Bhattacharya Lab (Biomedical Engineering)
raw_description: Engineers biomaterials and drug delivery systems for targeted cancer therapy, combining polymer chemistry, nanotechnology, and in vitro and in vivo testing.

name: Bhattacharya Lab (Applied Physics)
raw_description: Develops quantum sensing and nanophotonic platforms for biological imaging and single-molecule detection, bridging quantum optics and biophysics.

name: Bhattacharya Lab (Neuroscience)
raw_description: Investigates the synaptic and circuit mechanisms of memory consolidation and forgetting, using two-photon imaging, optogenetics, and mouse behavioral paradigms.

name: Bhattacharya Lab (EEB)
raw_description: Studies eco-evolutionary dynamics of host-pathogen coevolution, combining field ecology, population genetics, and mathematical modeling to understand disease emergence.

name: Bhattacharya Lab (MCDB)
raw_description: Examines how cells sense and respond to mechanical forces during tissue morphogenesis, using Drosophila genetics, live imaging, and biophysical tools.

name: Bhattacharya Lab (Chemistry)
raw_description: Develops chemical probes and bioorthogonal chemistry tools to study post-translational modifications and protein-protein interactions in living cells.

name: Bhattacharya Lab (Computer Science)
raw_description: Builds machine learning systems for clinical decision support, including natural language processing of EHR notes and predictive modeling for patient outcomes.

name: Bhattacharya Lab (Cell Biology)
raw_description: Studies organelle dynamics and protein quality control mechanisms, specifically how the endoplasmic reticulum and Golgi respond to stress and maintain proteostasis.

name: Bhattacharya Lab (Pathology)
raw_description: Applies spatial transcriptomics and multiplexed imaging to tumor pathology to map immune infiltration and tumor heterogeneity in solid cancers.

name: Bhattacharya Lab (Public Health)
raw_description: Investigates structural determinants of health disparities in cancer screening and treatment, with a focus on breast and cervical cancer in underserved populations.

name: Bhattacharya Lab (Pharmacology)
raw_description: Studies G protein-coupled receptor signaling and drug discovery for cardiovascular and metabolic diseases using structural pharmacology and high-throughput screening.

name: Bhattacharya Lab (Statistics)
raw_description: Develops Bayesian statistical methods for high-dimensional biological data, including sparse regression models for GWAS and Bayesian nonparametrics for microbiome analysis.

name: Bhattacharya Lab (Internal Medicine)
raw_description: Translational research on fibrosis and inflammation in chronic kidney disease and lupus nephritis, combining patient cohorts with mouse models and single-cell sequencing.

name: Bhattacharya Lab (Environmental Health)
raw_description: Studies the effects of environmental exposures including air pollution and PFAS on epigenetic regulation and cancer risk, using epidemiological cohorts and mechanistic cell studies.

name: Bhattacharya Lab (Psychology)
raw_description: Uses neuroimaging and computational modeling to study decision-making and reward processing in adolescents, with implications for addiction and mental health interventions.

name: Bhattacharya Lab (Biostatistics)
raw_description: Develops survival analysis and causal inference methods for clinical trials and observational studies, with applications in oncology and cardiovascular medicine.

name: Bhattacharya Lab (Aging)
raw_description: Investigates the molecular hallmarks of aging including cellular senescence, mitochondrial dysfunction, and proteostasis collapse, seeking interventions to extend healthspan.

name: Iwasaki Lab
raw_description: The Iwasaki Lab investigates innate and adaptive immune responses to viruses, including SARS-CoV-2, herpes simplex virus, and influenza, with a focus on sex differences in immunity and mucosal immunology.

name: Medzhitov Lab
raw_description: Studies the fundamental principles of innate immunity and inflammation, including Toll-like receptor signaling, tissue homeostasis, allergy, and the physiological role of inflammation.

name: Flavell Lab
raw_description: Studies T cell development, differentiation and function in immunity and tolerance, including the role of the microbiome in modulating immune responses and inflammatory disease.

name: Kaech Lab
raw_description: Investigates CD8 T cell differentiation and exhaustion in chronic infection and cancer, with goals of improving immunotherapy and vaccine strategies for persistent viral infections.

name: Eisenbarth Lab
raw_description: Examines how dendritic cells regulate adaptive immunity and tolerance, particularly in the context of allergic disease and asthma, using mouse genetic models.

name: Noonan Lab
raw_description: Investigates the genomic and epigenomic basis of human brain evolution and neurodevelopmental disorders, using comparative genomics and functional genomics in human and non-human primate cells.

name: Giraldez Lab
raw_description: Studies the role of microRNAs and RNA regulation during embryonic development, using zebrafish as a model system to understand gene expression programs driving cell fate decisions.

name: De Camilli Lab
raw_description: Studies membrane dynamics and vesicle trafficking at the synapse, focusing on endocytosis, phosphoinositide signaling, and synaptic vesicle recycling mechanisms.

name: Bhatt Lab (Proteomics)
raw_description: Develops and applies mass spectrometry-based proteomics and phosphoproteomics platforms to map signaling network rewiring in cancer and identify novel drug targets.

name: Bhatt Lab (Longevity)
raw_description: Uses C. elegans and mammalian models to identify genetic and pharmacological interventions extending lifespan, focusing on NAD+ metabolism, mTOR signaling, and epigenetic clocks.

name: Bhatt Lab (Microfluidics)
raw_description: Designs microfluidic platforms for high-throughput single-cell analysis, droplet-based drug screening, and organ-on-a-chip models of the gut, lung, and blood-brain barrier.

name: Craft Lab
raw_description: Investigates follicular helper T cells and their role in autoimmune diseases such as lupus, with a focus on how dysregulated germinal center reactions drive autoantibody production.

name: Palm Lab
raw_description: Studies how the microbiome shapes immune development and inflammatory disease, using germ-free mouse models and metagenomic approaches to identify microbial regulators of immunity.

name: Shlomchik Lab
raw_description: Examines B cell activation, germinal center biology, and the origins of autoimmunity, seeking to understand why self-tolerance breaks down in diseases like lupus and rheumatoid arthritis.

name: Reiner Lab
raw_description: Studies transcriptional regulation of T helper cell differentiation, focusing on how master transcription factors control Th1, Th2, and Th17 cell fate decisions.

name: Dhodapkar Lab
raw_description: Studies tumor immunology and the immune response to cancer, with a focus on myeloma, dendritic cell biology, and the development of cancer vaccines and immunotherapy strategies.

name: Bhatt Lab (NK Cell Biology)
raw_description: Studies NK cell biology and innate lymphoid cell development, focusing on how cytokine signals program NK cell effector functions against tumors and viral infections.

name: Bhatt Lab (Epigenomics)
raw_description: Maps chromatin accessibility and 3D genome architecture during cell differentiation using ATAC-seq, Hi-C, and CUT&RUN to understand how enhancers control developmental gene programs.

name: Bhatt Lab (Genome Stability)
raw_description: Studies mechanisms of DNA damage repair including homologous recombination and NHEJ, and how DNA repair defects drive cancer and aging using yeast and human cell models.

name: Bhatt Lab (RNA Biology)
raw_description: Investigates non-coding RNA regulation of gene expression, focusing on lncRNAs and circular RNAs in cancer and neural development using RNA-seq and CRISPR screens.

name: Bhatt Lab (Transposons)
raw_description: Studies how transposable elements are silenced in the germline by the piRNA pathway and how transposon mobilization contributes to genomic instability and aging.

name: Bhatt Lab (CRISPR Functional Genomics)
raw_description: Develops genome-wide CRISPR screens and base editing tools to identify essential genes and regulatory elements in cancer and stem cells at scale.

name: Bhatt Lab (Synaptic Plasticity)
raw_description: Studies the molecular mechanisms of long-term potentiation and synaptic plasticity in the hippocampus, and how plasticity defects underlie memory disorders.

name: Bhatt Lab (Glial Biology)
raw_description: Investigates how astrocytes and microglia regulate neuronal function and contribute to neuroinflammation in Alzheimer's disease, TBI, and ALS.

name: Bhatt Lab (Computational Neuroscience)
raw_description: Develops computational models of neural population dynamics and decision-making circuits, integrating electrophysiology data with theoretical frameworks from statistical physics.

name: Bhatt Lab (Addiction Neuroscience)
raw_description: Studies the neurobiology of addiction and reward circuitry in the nucleus accumbens and prefrontal cortex, using optogenetics and in vivo calcium imaging in rodent models.

name: Bhatt Lab (Sleep Neuroscience)
raw_description: Investigates the neural circuits and molecular mechanisms controlling sleep-wake transitions, circadian rhythms, and the role of sleep in memory consolidation.

name: Bhatt Lab (Epilepsy)
raw_description: Studies the genetic and circuit-level mechanisms of epilepsy, using patient iPSC-derived neurons, mouse models, and EEG to understand seizure initiation and identify new antiseizure therapies.

name: Bhatt Lab (Multiple Sclerosis)
raw_description: Investigates the immunopathogenesis of multiple sclerosis and neuromyelitis optica, using patient samples and mouse EAE models to identify neuroimmune mechanisms and test therapeutic strategies.

name: Bhatt Lab (Cryo-EM Ribosome)
raw_description: Uses cryo-EM to determine structures of the ribosome in complex with translation factors and antibiotics, revealing mechanisms of translational regulation and antibiotic resistance.

name: Bhatt Lab (Protein Folding)
raw_description: Studies how chaperone networks assist protein folding and prevent aggregation, with a focus on the Hsp70 and Hsp90 systems and their roles in cancer and neurodegeneration.

name: Bhatt Lab (Metabolic Biochemistry)
raw_description: Examines metabolic flux and allosteric regulation in central carbon metabolism using isotope tracing, metabolomics, and structural biochemistry.

name: Bhatt Lab (Nuclear Organization)
raw_description: Investigates the 3D organization of the nucleus, including phase separation of chromatin compartments, nuclear pore dynamics, and how nuclear architecture controls gene expression.

name: Bhatt Lab (Cilia Biology)
raw_description: Studies the biogenesis and signaling functions of primary cilia, and how ciliary defects cause ciliopathies such as polycystic kidney disease and Bardet-Biedl syndrome.

name: Bhatt Lab (Mitochondrial Dynamics)
raw_description: Examines how mitochondrial fission and fusion are coordinated with cellular metabolism, stress responses, and apoptosis, with implications for neurodegeneration and metabolic disease.

name: Bhatt Lab (Organogenesis)
raw_description: Studies how organs form during embryonic development, using mouse and zebrafish genetic models to understand the signals that specify organ primordia and control organogenesis.

name: Bhatt Lab (Germ Cell Biology)
raw_description: Investigates the molecular mechanisms of germ cell specification, meiosis, and gamete formation, with implications for infertility and reproductive medicine.

name: Bhatt Lab (Microbiome Ecology)
raw_description: Studies microbial community ecology in soil and marine environments, using metagenomics and stable isotope probing to understand nutrient cycling and ecosystem function.

name: Bhatt Lab (Conservation Genetics)
raw_description: Applies population genomics to conservation biology, assessing genetic diversity, inbreeding, and adaptive potential in endangered species to inform conservation management.

name: Bhatt Lab (Climate Ecology)
raw_description: Studies how climate change alters species distributions, phenology, and community composition in terrestrial ecosystems using long-term field monitoring and ecological modeling.

name: Bhatt Lab (Chemical Glycobiology)
raw_description: Develops chemical tools to study glycosylation in living cells, including metabolic labeling reagents and glycan-targeted probes for imaging and manipulating glycan biology.

name: Bhatt Lab (Supramolecular Chemistry)
raw_description: Designs self-assembling molecular systems and functional supramolecular materials for applications in drug delivery, catalysis, and molecular sensing.

name: Bhatt Lab (Electrochemistry)
raw_description: Studies electrocatalysis and electrochemical energy storage, developing new electrode materials and catalysts for CO2 reduction, nitrogen fixation, and next-generation batteries.

name: Bhatt Lab (Chemical Neuroscience)
raw_description: Designs and synthesizes fluorescent probes and chemogenetic tools to image neurotransmitter dynamics in living neural circuits with subcellular spatial resolution.

name: Bhatt Lab (Soft Matter Physics)
raw_description: Studies the physics of soft matter and biological systems including colloids, gels, membranes, and cytoskeletal networks using light scattering and rheology.

name: Bhatt Lab (Quantum Materials)
raw_description: Synthesizes and characterizes novel quantum materials including strongly correlated oxides and 2D van der Waals magnets, probing emergent quantum phenomena with transport and spectroscopy.

name: Bhatt Lab (Biophysics Single Molecule)
raw_description: Uses optical tweezers and single-molecule FRET to measure the mechanics and dynamics of motor proteins, DNA replication machinery, and chromatin remodeling complexes.

name: Bhatt Lab (CS Natural Language Processing)
raw_description: Develops large language model applications for scientific discovery and clinical medicine, including systems for biomedical literature mining, drug-target prediction, and clinical note summarization.

name: Bhatt Lab (CS Graph Learning)
raw_description: Develops graph neural network methods for molecular property prediction, protein-protein interaction networks, and knowledge graph reasoning in biomedicine.

name: Bhatt Lab (CS Systems Biology)
raw_description: Builds computational models of gene regulatory networks and signaling pathways, using dynamical systems theory and machine learning to predict network behavior and therapeutic targets.

name: Bhatt Lab (BME Tissue Engineering)
raw_description: Engineers vascularized tissue constructs and bioprinted organoids for cardiac, liver, and neural applications, combining biomaterials with stem cell differentiation protocols.

name: Bhatt Lab (BME Ultrasound)
raw_description: Develops ultrasound and photoacoustic imaging technologies for real-time deep tissue imaging, including focused ultrasound neuromodulation and microbubble-mediated drug delivery.

name: Bhatt Lab (BME Wearables)
raw_description: Designs flexible and wearable biosensors for continuous health monitoring, including electrochemical glucose sensors, sweat electrolyte monitors, and ECG patches.

name: Bhatt Lab (IM Endocrinology)
raw_description: Studies the molecular mechanisms of thyroid hormone action and metabolism, and the role of thyroid dysfunction in cardiovascular disease and bone loss using mouse models and patient cohorts.

name: Bhatt Lab (IM Nephrology)
raw_description: Investigates glomerular disease and acute kidney injury mechanisms at the single-cell level, combining patient kidney biopsies with spatial transcriptomics to identify novel therapeutic targets.

name: Bhatt Lab (IM Gastroenterology)
raw_description: Studies the pathogenesis of inflammatory bowel disease and colorectal cancer, examining epithelial barrier function, mucosal immunity, and the gut microbiome in patient cohorts and mouse models.

name: Bhatt Lab (Radiology AI)
raw_description: Develops deep learning algorithms for automated medical image analysis, including detection of pulmonary nodules, brain lesions, and cardiac abnormalities in CT, MRI, and X-ray.

name: Bhatt Lab (Radiation Biology)
raw_description: Studies cellular and molecular responses to ionizing radiation, including DNA damage signaling, radiation-induced bystander effects, and sensitization strategies for radiotherapy.

name: Bhatt Lab (Path Neurodegeneration)
raw_description: Uses postmortem human brain tissue and neuropathological methods combined with single-nucleus RNA-seq to characterize cellular changes in Alzheimer's, Parkinson's, and frontotemporal dementia.

name: Bhatt Lab (Path Infectious Disease)
raw_description: Applies clinical metagenomics and rapid diagnostics to identify novel pathogens and drug-resistant organisms in critically ill patients, bridging clinical microbiology and translational research.

name: Bhatt Lab (Surgery Vascular)
raw_description: Studies vascular biology and the mechanisms of atherosclerosis, focusing on smooth muscle cell phenotype switching and endothelial inflammation as targets for cardiovascular therapy.

name: Bhatt Lab (Thoracic Surgery)
raw_description: Translational research on lung cancer biology and mesothelioma, focusing on novel immunotherapy combinations and ex vivo lung perfusion models for organ preservation.

name: Bhatt Lab (YSPH Nutrition)
raw_description: Examines the relationship between dietary patterns, gut microbiome composition, and cardiometabolic disease risk using large prospective cohorts and randomized controlled trials.

name: Bhatt Lab (YSPH Social Epidemiology)
raw_description: Studies how social networks and neighborhood environments influence chronic disease incidence, using geospatial analysis and agent-based models of health behavior diffusion.

name: Bhatt Lab (YSPH Opioid Epidemiology)
raw_description: Conducts epidemiological research on the opioid crisis, including overdose mortality surveillance, evaluation of naloxone distribution programs, and predictors of treatment retention.
